default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Outset and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and article production.](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [20 new articles approved, including 12 specialty series articles (e.g., "How to become an OB-GYN")](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Focus on high-volume keywords like "best colleges for pre-med" and summer programs for high schoolers interested in medicine](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Plan to create listicle-style content (e.g., "Top 15 summer programs for high schoolers interested in medicine")](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Shift from Slack to email communication due to temporary downgrade in Slack plan](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)

## Topics

### Specialty Series Articles

  - [12 articles approved with consistent outline: job description, training requirements, job outlook, and salary](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Starting with pharmacist specialty due to high search volume](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Template to be created for efficient rollout of other specialties](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

### Additional Article Ideas

  - [Approved topics: pros/cons of being a doctor, "Do I have what it takes to be a doctor?", types of healthcare careers](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [High potential for "How to become a \[specialty\]" series due to search volume](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Summer Programs and Pre-med Content

  - [Plan to create listicles: "Top 15 summer programs for high schoolers interested in medicine/nursing/STEM"](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Focus on university-run programs rather than competitors](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Potential to expand into adjacent topics (chemistry, biology) to capture related interest](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Pre-med college rankings planned for future, with individual university deep-dives](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)

### Content Strategy for University Summer Programs

  - [Challenge: AI struggles with accurate information gathering for specific university programs](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Solution: Focus on programs run by universities themselves, avoid mentioning competitors](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Idea: Create comprehensive list of universities offering relevant summer camps in a single article](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Content Approval Process

  - [Lawson to review one article closely for structure and phrasing](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Other articles in the series can then follow the approved template](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Topics for 20 new articles (12 specialty + 8 others) approved for development](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### Communication Changes

  - [Shifted from Slack to email due to expiration of Slack pro trial](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Both parties agree email is sufficient for their communication needs](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to develop and share one specialty series article for Lawson's detailed review](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Create template based on approved article for efficient production of remaining specialty articles](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Begin research and writing for summer program listicles](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Explore keyword options for comprehensive university summer program article](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Continue using email for primary communication](https://fathom.video/share/w2-e9b_x9ywB3JPutGgdMHTbEzMxYsLx?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)

action_items.description: Create & share first specialty article (pharmacist) as template for approval
Review & approve specialty article template, focusing on structure & phrasing
Develop "Top 15 summer programs for high schoolers interested in medicine" article
Identify university programs for "Top 15" medicine summer programs list
Find keyword for article listing colleges with summer camps
Find right keywords for combined university summer programs article
